purpose: Freeze the reviewer-defense baseline and ablation matrix for H001 before any terminal utility, formula revision, first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, Step 4-5 promotion, or paper claim. The matrix tests whether active re-observation utility is more than semantic thresholding, random extra views, confidence replanning, semantic frontier exploration, semantic memory reuse, or geometry-only exploration.

core_task_controls.name: NoReobserveReference
core_task_controls.role: Direct semantic-map commit baseline and wrong-goal prior.
core_task_controls.reviewer_question: Does the failure mode exist before active re-observation?

core_task_controls.name: SemanticOnly
core_task_controls.role: Semantic evidence / semantic uncertainty baseline without map-pose utility.
core_task_controls.reviewer_question: Is the proposed method more than semantic uncertainty or semantic evidence update alone?

active_observation_controls.name: RandomReobserve
action_inputs: same candidate/viewpoint pool as proposed policy
active_observation_controls.reviewer_question: Does active selection matter, or does any extra view help?

active_observation_controls.name: FrontierReobserve
forbidden_inputs: semantic rank as tie-breaker unless explicitly ablated
active_observation_controls.reviewer_question: Is the gain semantic uncertainty utility, or just geometry-only exploration?

semantic_slam_component_controls.name: SLAMOnly
semantic_slam_component_controls.role: Map/pose uncertainty or geometry-only utility without semantic goal-validity utility.
semantic_slam_component_controls.reviewer_question: Can map/pose uncertainty alone explain the effect?

semantic_slam_component_controls.name: SemanticSLAMInteraction
semantic_slam_component_controls.role: Proposed combined semantic + map/pose active re-observation utility.
forbidden_designs: SemanticOnly plus nonnegative bonus on every row
semantic_slam_component_controls.reviewer_question: Does semantic-map uncertainty become active SLAM/navigation utility rather than a module combination?

related_work_references.name: CARe_style_confidence_replanning
related_work_references.role: Confidence / uncertainty replanning reference for inaccurate pre-explored semantic maps.
related_work_references.naming_rule: Use CARe-style unless the official CARe code and evaluation protocol are reproduced.
forbidden_inputs: new active observation evidence unless explicitly configured as an H001 extension
related_work_references.reviewer_question: Is H001 only a confidence-replanning variant?

related_work_references.name: VLFM_style_semantic_frontier_reference
related_work_references.naming_rule: Use VLFM-style unless the exact VLFM system is reproduced.
related_work_references.reviewer_question: Is the effect already explained by semantic frontier exploration?

related_work_references.name: OneMap_style_semantic_memory_reference
related_work_references.role: Open-vocabulary semantic memory / reusable map reference.
related_work_references.naming_rule: Use OneMap-style unless the exact OneMap system is reproduced.
related_work_references.reviewer_question: Is H001 just reusable semantic memory with a different evaluation?

oracle_references.name: GTTargetOracle
oracle_references.role: Shortest path or path-efficiency upper bound to the valid target.

oracle_references.name: GTCandidateOracle
allowed_use: candidate coverage vs policy failure separation

simpler_alternative_matrix.name: confidence_threshold_only
simpler_alternative_matrix.tests: Whether a scalar semantic confidence threshold is enough.
simpler_alternative_matrix.expected_failure_to_report: over-deferral or wrong-goal confirmation when object visibility does not imply goal validity

simpler_alternative_matrix.name: direct_semantic_memory_commit
simpler_alternative_matrix.tests: Whether direct semantic-memory retrieval is enough.
simpler_alternative_matrix.expected_failure_to_report: wrong repeated-instance or no-valid candidate commitment

simpler_alternative_matrix.name: detector_score_confirmation
simpler_alternative_matrix.tests: Whether detector confidence can confirm the goal.
simpler_alternative_matrix.expected_failure_to_report: detector visibility confirms object existence but not ObjectNav goal validity

simpler_alternative_matrix.name: geometry_only_viewpoint
simpler_alternative_matrix.tests: Whether map/pose or frontier-only viewpoint choice is enough.
simpler_alternative_matrix.expected_failure_to_report: same-category rivals remain unresolved or geometry-only commits become unsafe

simpler_alternative_matrix.name: random_budget_matched_observation
simpler_alternative_matrix.expected_failure_to_report: extra observation budget without uncertainty-targeted evidence has weaker wrong-goal/wasted-path tradeoff

next_research_task.reason: The baseline and ablation matrix is frozen; the next step is to define the promotion gate that says how much wrong-goal and wasted-path reduction is required without degrading map/pose consistency before any terminal utility or formula revision.
